description: Pain Engine backlog — structured idea store

items.title: FHI APP Fraud Reimbursement Guide
items.description: High-priority: UK PSR mandatory reimbursement rules (Oct 2024) are not widely understood. Build authoritative guide targeting APP fraud reimbursement queries. High search volume, affiliate potential (FOS, legal services).

items.name: VST Pricing Plans Page
items.description: White-label pricing page with 3-tier plan cards, comparison table, and Stripe-ready CTAs.

items.title: Execution Layer: /execution/latest API endpoint
items.description: Add GET /execution/latest endpoint to scheduler-server.ts. Serves execution-panel-result.json. Required for Pain Control execution panel to load live FHI/VST run data without page refresh.

items.title: FHI Fraud Type Guidance Pages (8 types)
items.description: Build individual guidance pages for all 8 classified fraud types using skel-fhi-001. Each page: type-specific hero, immediate actions, reporting routes, recovery info, FAQs.

items.name: Scheduler Health Dashboard Panel
items.description: Add a real-time health panel to scheduler-ui.html showing queue depth, failure rate, avg task duration, and overnight mode status.

items.title: FHI Fraud Checker Interactive Tool
items.description: Multi-step fraud checker: channel → signals → classification → action output. Uses classificationMatrix from fhi-intelligence.json. No account required.

items.name: VST Hero Section — Booking CTA + Destination Carousel
items.description: Build hero section with primary booking CTA button, destination image carousel, and trust signals. Gate-ready asset.

items.title: VST Pricing Page CTA Optimisation
items.description: Audit and optimise VST pricing page: ensure free trial CTA above fold, pricing clarity, compliance with BIAB monetisation law. High conversion leverage.

items.name: FHI Fraud Report Submission Form
items.description: Accessible multi-step fraud report form. Compliant, mobile-first, validates on submit. Required for FHI v1 launch.

items.title: VST Safety Brief with FHI Fraud Awareness Integration
items.description: Surface FHI fraud awareness content in VST travel safety briefing flow. Destination-specific fraud type alerts (e.g. ATM skimming in country X). Cross-asset value, zero additional build cost.

items.title: ADMIN System Health Dashboard Surface
items.description: Build read-only system health dashboard using skel-admin-001. Shows: alignment score, module health, knowledge gap count, backlog readiness. Founder view of Pain System overall health.

items.name: Pre-Gate Audit UI Panel
items.description: Surface pre-gate audit results directly in scheduler-ui.html — verdict badge, flag list, dimension floor breaches.

items.title: BACKYARD: GEO Content Generator Prototype
items.description: Prototype: AI-generated GEO-optimised content blocks for FHI and VST. Input: fraud type or travel policy topic. Output: structured answer blocks ready for page insertion. Test in BACKYARD before promoting.

items.name: Experimental Dark Mode Theme
items.description: Prototype dark mode CSS variables for scheduler UI. Not production-ready.
